authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(12) — Big Tree Creek (Calaveras Co.)
sources.quotedText: (12) Big Tree Creek (Calaveras Co.) within Calaveras Big Trees State Park (upstream of the Highway 4 culvert crossing). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 266455, "Big Trees Creek", Stream, Calaveras Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":266455,"gaz_name":"Big Trees Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Calaveras"} — geometry multipoint; downstream/mouth point (Web Mercator -13396365.5054, 4617390.9277) converts to lon -120.341586, lat 38.268250 (elevation ~1181 m per USGS Elevation Point Query Service). Cross-checked against the GeoNames.org mirror of this GNIS record: 38.2682503, -120.3415859, elevation 1181m. Corrects the prior file coordinate (-120.3031, 38.2897), which was ~4.12 km northeast of the creek's GNIS mouth point, near the North Grove/Highway 4 area, and appears to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull.

parameters.note: Big Tree Creek within Calaveras Big Trees State Park, upstream of the Highway 4 culvert crossing, is closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year, within Calaveras Big Trees State Park upstream of the Highway 4 culvert crossing
regulations.verbatimText: within Calaveras Big Trees State Park (upstream of the Highway 4 culvert crossing). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This water is closed to all fishing all year, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
